rationale: The citing paper explicitly positions itself as extending prior outsourcing/alliance governance research under technological uncertainty, and the cited 2003 JMKR paper provides a transaction-cost/production-cost framework for outsourcing and sourcing choices with technological volatility in technology-intensive markets. Given this strong conceptual overlap (outsourcing governance under uncertainty), this does not look like an obvious incidental mention even though only DOI-level match evidence is available.
